xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content: # Security guidance AI.MCP.Code.security.notice=For the strongest access control, run the agent as a dedicated XWiki user whose rights are scoped to what it should access. The tool and space settings here narrow what the agent sees on top of that user's rights - they do not replace them. AI.MCP.Code.security.notice.reach=Disabling a wiki's MCP endpoint does not hide that wiki from other endpoints: any endpoint with cross-wiki reach can still read and search it. Use the space and document filters (and rights) to control what is visible. AI.MCP.Code.security.notice.filters=Filters are scoping, not secrecy: a request for a filtered document is refused with a distinct message, so the filter's entries are observable by the agent. # Class fields AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigClass_serverName=Server Name AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigClass_serverDescription=Server Description # Farm dashboard AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.heading=MCP across all wikis AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.intro=Enable or disable the MCP endpoint for each wiki of this farm, and grant cross-wiki reach. An endpoint with reach can search and act (read and write) across every wiki of the farm using its own tool set and space filter - the other wikis' own MCP settings (whether their endpoint is enabled, their tool toggles, their space filter) do not restrict it. Only the acting user's document rights always apply, so reach never grants access a user would not otherwise have. You can only change wikis on which you have admin rights. AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.enabled=MCP enabled AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.reach=Cross-wiki reach AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.wiki=Wiki AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.configure=Configure AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.enabled=Enabled AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.disabled=Disabled AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.configure.link=Configure AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.button.apply=Save AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.error.csrf=The form token is invalid. No change was applied. Please try again. AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied={0} wiki(s) updated. AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied.skipped={0} wiki(s) updated, {1} skipped (insufficient rights). # Tools AI.MCP.Code.tools.heading=Tools AI.MCP.Code.tools.intro=Choose which tools this wiki's MCP endpoint exposes. Authoring (write) tools are off by default. AI.MCP.Code.tools.mandatory=(always on) # Additional filters (collapsible group wrapping the scope filters below) AI.MCP.Code.additionalFilters.heading=Additional filters # Space access AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.heading=Space access AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.intro=Scope these tools to specific spaces and documents, on top of the acting user's document rights - this narrows results but is not an access-control boundary. It does not affect semantic/collection search, which is governed by collection rights. AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.spaces.label=Spaces (each covers its subtree) AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.documents.label=Documents (matched exactly) AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.empty=None selected yet. AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.remove=Remove AI.MCP.Code.spaceFilter.crossWikiHint=Cross-wiki reach is enabled for this endpoint, so you can also scope spaces and documents in other wikis; those are stored with their wiki prefix.
